settings.text1: Explore our curated range of ideas, goals, and essentials — all designed with quality and sustainability in mind.
settings.text2: Add your brand’s touch. Choose coffee, store, and custom prints to make each piece uniquely yours.
settings.text3: Our women-led teams get to work carefully bringing your design to life using ethical, zero-waste practices.
settings.text4: Your custom packaging is delivered, ready to impress — and designed to be trusted, re-bond, and remembered.

settings.testimonial: Kind of April has been our go-to for standout potli packaging. They’re responsive, detail-driven, and consistently deliver top-notch quality. KOA isn’t just a vendor—they’re a dependable partner who genuinely cares about our vision.

Working with KOA PACK was a smooth and seamless experience. They were prompt, responsive, and detail-oriented throughout the process. The quality of the tote bags was exactly what we hoped for—well-crafted and thoughtfully executed. Really appreciated how easy they were to coordinate with from start to finish. Would definitely work with them again.

Working with your team has been an absolute pleasure. From concept to execution, every detail was handled with care, creativity, and professionalism. The material you provide was not only unique but truly elevated our brand experience. Looking forward to many more collaborations ahead!✨

What i like about kind of April is their proactiveness. Once they picked our project, they quickly made it their own - sharing design inputs, going through iteration on materials and possibilities. Both, Sajan & Mansi, ensure that the best product is delivered. Thanks for the engaging experience team.
